title: AXCollapseClickEvent
description: Event emitted when the collapse header is clicked. Extends AXClickEvent and adds a handled flag to optionally suppress the default toggle behavior.

props.name: component
props.description: The sender component. For this event it will be an AXCollapseComponent instance. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: htmlElement
props.description: The HTML element of the collapse component. Inherited from AXEvent.

props.name: nativeEvent
props.description: The native event that triggered the click (MouseEvent in this case). Inherited from AXHtmlEvent/AXClickEvent.

props.name: data
props.description: Optional extra data associated with the click event. Inherited from AXClickEvent.

props.name: handled
props.description: Indicates whether the event has been handled. If false, the component will automatically toggle the collapse state.

props.name: isUserInteraction
props.description: Whether the event was triggered by a user action. Inherited from AXEvent.
